# Pull Request Template

## Types of Changes
- [ ] **New Feature** – Adds a new feature or functionality
- [ ] **Bug Fix** – Fixes a bug or unexpected behavior
- [ ] **Refactor** – Code restructuring without changing behavior
- [ ] **Documentation** – Updates or adds documentation only
- [ ] **UI / Styling** – Changes to the user interface or visual design

## Description
<!-- Describe the purpose of this PR and what has been changed -->
